name: snapaway
author: Edenware
description: Shield your sensitive Windows from snooping eyes

scripts.verify:community: npm run verify:open-core && set "NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=6144" && npm run build
scripts.build: electron-vite build && npm run clean:nodeexe:out && npm run copy-tray-icons && npm run copy:nodeexe:out
scripts.copy:nodeexe:out: echo 'Skipping node.exe alias - using Symbol Resolution from main executable'
scripts.clean:nodeexe:out:
if exist out\main
ode.exe (del /F /Q out\main
ode.exe && echo Removed stale out\main
ode.exe) else (echo out\main
ode.exe not present)
scripts.appx:dir: npm run build-helper && npm run prune:node-modules && npm run prepare:appx-assets && npm run build && npm run copy:natives && electron-builder --win appx --dir && python scripts/fix-appx-installer-data.py
scripts.rebuild:native: npm run rebuild:audio && npm run rebuild:icons && npm run rebuild:process && npm run rebuild:windows && npm run rebuild:iap
scripts.rebuild:audio: cd src/audio && npm install && npx electron-rebuild -f --module-dir . --version 28.0.0 --arch x64
scripts.rebuild:icons: cd src/icons && npm install && npx electron-rebuild -f --module-dir . --version 28.0.0 --arch x64
scripts.rebuild:process: cd src/process && npm install && npx electron-rebuild -f --module-dir . --version 28.0.0 --arch x64
scripts.rebuild:windows: cd src/windows && npm install && npx electron-rebuild -f --module-dir . --version 28.0.0 --arch x64
scripts.rebuild:iap: cd src/iap && npm install && npx electron-rebuild -f --module-dir . --version 28.0.0 --arch x64
scripts.rebuild:minimal: cd src/minimal && npm install && npx electron-rebuild -f --module-dir . --version 28.3.3 --arch x64
scripts.copy:natives: if not exist dist mkdir dist && npm run copy:audio && npm run copy:icons && npm run copy:process && npm run copy:windows && npm run copy:iap
scripts.copy:audio: if exist src\audio\build\Release\audio_addon.node (copy /Y "src\audio\build\Release\audio_addon.node" "dist\audio_addon.node") else (echo Audio addon not found)
scripts.copy:icons: if exist src\icons\build\Release\icon_addon.node (copy /Y "src\icons\build\Release\icon_addon.node" "dist\icon_addon.node") else (echo Icon addon not found)
scripts.copy:process: if exist src\process\build\Release\process_addon.node (copy /Y "src\process\build\Release\process_addon.node" "dist\process_addon.node") else (echo Process addon not found)
scripts.copy:windows: if exist src\windows\build\Release\windows_addon.node (copy /Y "src\windows\build\Release\windows_addon.node" "dist\windows_addon.node") else (echo Windows addon not found)
scripts.copy:iap: if exist src\iap\build\Release\iap_addon.node (copy /Y "src\iap\build\Release\iap_addon.node" "dist\iap_addon.node") else (echo IAP addon not found)
scripts.copy:nodeexe: echo 'Skipping node.exe alias - native modules resolve via SnapAway.exe'
scripts.copy:dev:iap: if not exist out\main mkdir out\main && copy /Y "src\iap\iap-wrapper.js" "out\main\iap-wrapper.js" && copy /Y "src\iap\iap-child.js" "out\main\iap-child.js"
scripts.dev:iap-test: npm run copy:dev:iap && set "IAP_DEV_TEST=1" && electron-vite dev
scripts.test:iap:electron: npm run copy:dev:iap && npx electron scripts/test-iap-electron.js
scripts.test:iap:quick: npm run copy:dev:iap && npx electron scripts/test-iap-electron.js
scripts.publish: npm run rebuild:native && npm run prepare:appx-assets && npm run build && electron-builder --publish
scripts.pack: npm run prepare:appx-assets && npm run build && npm run copy:natives && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.pack:dir: npm run prepare:appx-assets && npm run build && npm run copy:natives && electron-builder --win --x64 --dir
scripts.pack:all: npm run rebuild:native && npm run pack
scripts.build:appx-signed: npm run rebuild:native && npm run dist:appx
scripts.appx:test-local: npm run appx:dir && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/sign-installer-force-cert.ps1
scripts.test:iap: npm run rebuild:iap && npm run copy:iap && node scripts/test-iap.js && npm run test:iap:electron
scripts.dist:exe: npm run build-helper && npm run prune:node-modules && npm run pack:dir && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/sign-win-unpacked.ps1 && npm run pack:nsis:from-dir && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$env:SKIP_APPX_SIGN='true'; & 'scripts/sign-installer.ps1'"
scripts.dist:win: npm run build-helper && npm run prune:node-modules && npm run prepare:appx-assets && npm run build && npm run copy:natives && electron-builder --win --x64 --dir && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/sign-win-unpacked.ps1 && npm run pack:nsis:from-dir && electron-builder --win appx --dir && python scripts/fix-appx-installer-data.py && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/sign-installer.ps1
scripts.#note: pack:all is for use when native modules need rebuilding
